metadata.name: TigerPay Tokenized Debt Protocol
metadata.description: Blockchain-based BNPL/Lending platform with tokenized debt, merchant-focused fundraising with installment-based capital deployment and repayment

core_concept.description: Merchants raise capital (e.g., 100K AED) through tokenized debt vaults. TigerPay creates credit scores. Investors fund based on risk appetite. Capital released in tranches (airdrops). Merchants repay in installments (e.g., 115K for 15% return). Returns distributed to token holders proportionally.

blockchain.rationale: Lower gas fees, faster transactions, EVM compatibility

backend.cache: Redis for session and rate limiting

oracles.primary: Chainlink for price feeds and external data
oracles.secondary: Custom oracle for TigerPay transaction data

storage.documents: IPFS/Arweave for legal documents and agreements

objectives.objective: Set up development environment and infrastructure
Research regulatory requirements for tokenized securities in UAE
Define technical architecture and data models
Establish development workflows and CI/CD

deliverables.deliverable: AWS/GCP account with VPC, subnets, and security groups
CI/CD pipeline (GitHub Actions or GitLab CI)

task.name: Regulatory & Compliance Research

deliverables.deliverable: Data residency and privacy requirements (GDPR, UAE DPA)

task.team_required: Legal Advisor, Compliance Officer, Product Manager

task.name: System Architecture Design

deliverables.deliverable: Smart contract architecture and interaction flows
Data flow diagrams for key processes

task.team_required: Solutions Architect, Backend Lead, Blockchain Lead

objectives.objective: Develop and test core smart contracts for vault, tokens, and payments
Implement multi-signature controls and access management
Create comprehensive test suite with 95%+ coverage
Complete internal security audit

task.name: Debt Token Contract (ERC-20 Variant)
task.description: Create custom ERC-20 token representing fractional ownership of merchant debt. Each vault issues unique tokens. Include transfer restrictions and investor whitelisting.

technical_specs.spec: Implement ERC-20 standard with OpenZeppelin base
Add snapshot capability for dividend distribution
Role-based access: MINTER, PAUSER, ADMIN
Events: TokensMinted, TokensBurned, InvestorWhitelisted

task.team_required: Senior Blockchain Developer, Smart Contract Auditor

task.name: Merchant Vault Contract
task.description: Core vault contract that holds investor funds, manages tranche releases, processes merchant repayments, and distributes returns to token holders.

deliverables.deliverable: Investment acceptance logic with minimum/maximum limits
Tranche release mechanism with milestone verification
Comprehensive test suite including edge cases

technical_specs.spec: States: FUNDRAISING, ACTIVE, REPAYING, COMPLETED, DEFAULTED
Functions: invest(), releaseTranche(), makeRepayment(), claimReturns()
Time-locks for each phase transition
Oracle integration for milestone verification
Proportional distribution calculation for returns
ReentrancyGuard for all fund movement functions

vault_states.state: Accepting investor deposits until target met or deadline reached
Tranches being released based on milestones
All repayments made, investors can claim returns
Merchant missed payments, liquidation process triggered

task.name: Vault Factory Contract
task.description: Factory pattern contract to create new vaults for each merchant fundraising campaign. Maintains registry of all vaults and their statuses.

technical_specs.spec: Use EIP-1167 minimal proxy for gas-efficient deployment
Store vault metadata on-chain (merchant ID, target amount, terms)
Emit VaultCreated event with all parameters
Admin functions to pause factory or blacklist merchants

task.name: Milestone Oracle Contract
task.description: Oracle contract for verifying merchant milestones before tranche releases. Integrates with off-chain verification system.

technical_specs.spec: Require M-of-N signatures from trusted verifiers
Milestone types: REVENUE_TARGET, INVENTORY_VERIFICATION, AUDIT_COMPLETION
Timelock before milestone becomes finalized
Challenge period for disputes

task.name: Payment Processor Contract
task.description: Handles merchant repayment flows, calculates distributions, and manages payment schedules.

technical_specs.spec: Track payment schedule: amount, due date, status
Calculate penalties: late_fee = principal * penalty_rate * days_late
Handle partial payments and payment allocation
Integration with vault contract for fund distribution

task.name: Smart Contract Testing & Auditing
task.description: Comprehensive testing including unit, integration, and security tests. Internal security audit before external audit.

deliverables.deliverable: Unit tests for all contracts (95%+ coverage)

test_scenarios.scenario: Full lifecycle: fundraise → tranche releases → repayments → completion
Edge cases: zero amounts, maximum values, dust amounts

deliverables.deliverable: Deployment scripts for testnet and mainnet

milestones.milestone: All core contracts deployed to testnet
Internal security audit completed with no critical issues

risks.risk: Smart contract vulnerabilities leading to fund loss
Gas costs too high for merchant repayments

objectives.objective: Build ML-powered credit scoring engine for merchants
Create risk assessment models for investment opportunities
Integrate with TigerPay transaction history
Develop real-time monitoring and alert system

task.name: Data Pipeline & Feature Engineering
task.description: Build data pipeline to collect, clean, and transform merchant data for credit scoring.

deliverables.deliverable: ETL pipeline from TigerPay transaction database

data_sources.source: Merchant business profile (industry, age, legal structure)

category.name: Financial Behavior
category.feature: Late payment history (if any existing loans)

task.team_required: Data Engineer, ML Engineer, Backend Developer

task.name: Credit Scoring Model Development
task.description: Develop and train ML models to generate credit scores (300-850 scale similar to FICO).

deliverables.deliverable: Multiple model implementations (XGBoost, Random Forest, Neural Network)

model.name: Primary: XGBoost Classifier
model.rationale: Excellent for tabular data, handles missing values well, fast training
model.output: Credit score (300-850) and probability of default

model.name: Secondary: LightGBM
model.rationale: Faster inference, good for real-time scoring

training_approach.step: Collect historical merchant data (need 6-12 months for initial training)
Label data based on payment performance (good payer = 1, defaulter = 0)
Evaluate with AUC-ROC, precision-recall, calibration curve
A/B testing in production with shadow scoring

task.team_required: Senior ML Engineer, Data Scientist, Backend Developer

task.name: Risk Tier Classification System
task.description: Classify merchants into risk tiers affecting interest rates, funding amounts, and terms.

deliverables.deliverable: Interest rate pricing model based on risk

task.team_required: ML Engineer, Financial Engineer, Product Manager

task.name: Real-Time Monitoring & Alert System
task.description: Monitor merchant health in real-time and alert on concerning patterns.

deliverables.deliverable: RESTful API for credit score retrieval
Audit logging for all score requests

milestones.milestone: Credit scoring model achieves AUC >0.80 on test set
API integrated with main backend services
Risk tier system validated with historical data

data_requirements.requirement: Minimum 500 merchant transaction histories for training
At least 50 examples of defaults/late payments for labeling
6-12 months of historical data per merchant

objectives.objective: Build microservices architecture for core business logic
Develop RESTful and GraphQL APIs
Implement authentication, authorization, and KYC flows
Create job queues for async processing

user_roles.role: Can create fundraising campaigns, view analytics, make repayments
Can browse vaults, invest, view portfolio, claim returns
Full platform access, approve merchants, manage disputes

task.name: KYC/AML Compliance Service
task.description: Integrate with third-party KYC providers for identity verification and compliance screening.

deliverables.deliverable: Integration with KYC provider (Onfido, Jumio, or local UAE provider)

task.name: Merchant Vault Management Service
task.description: Core service managing merchant fundraising campaigns, vault creation, and lifecycle management.

endpoint.workflow: 1. Validate merchant credit score 2. Calculate risk tier and max funding 3. Create pending campaign in database 4. Submit for admin approval 5. Deploy smart contract vault (upon approval) 6. Notify merchant of campaign URL

endpoint.description: Release tranche to merchant (after milestone approval)
endpoint.workflow: 1. Verify milestone approved 2. Trigger smart contract tranche release 3. Transfer funds to merchant wallet 4. Log transaction 5. Notify merchant and investors

task.name: Investment Service
task.description: Handle investor deposits, portfolio management, and return distributions.

deliverables.deliverable: Investment flow (wallet connection, deposit, token minting)

endpoint.workflow: 1. Verify KYC status and investment limits 2. Check vault still accepting investments 3. Generate payment intent / wallet transaction 4. Wait for payment confirmation (on-chain or bank) 5. Call smart contract invest() function 6. Mint debt tokens to investor 7. Update portfolio 8. Send confirmation email
1. Check claimable amount from smart contract 2. Execute claimReturns() transaction 3. Transfer funds to investor wallet 4. Update portfolio 5. Generate tax document

task.name: Repayment Processing Service
task.description: Automate merchant repayment collection and distribution to investors.

repayment_flow.step: 3 days before due date: Send reminder to merchant
On due date: Attempt auto-debit from TigerPay merchant balance
If insufficient balance: Send urgent notification
1 day after due date: Grace period, send warning
3 days after due date: Apply late fee, escalate to collections team
7 days after due date: Initiate default process, pause future tranches
14 days after due date: Legal action, liquidation of collateral

auto_debit_logic.rule: Check merchant TigerPay balance at 2 AM on due date
If balance >= repayment amount: auto-deduct and process
If balance insufficient but >= 50%: partial payment option
If balance < 50%: wait for manual payment, send alerts

background_jobs.job: Check for late payments and apply penalties
Alert merchants of approaching milestone deadlines

milestones.milestone: All core APIs documented and tested
KYC flow fully integrated and tested
End-to-end flow tested (merchant onboarding → investment → repayment)

architecture_patterns.pattern: API Gateway for unified entry point
Circuit breakers for external service calls

objectives.objective: Build responsive web applications for merchants and investors
Implement wallet integration and blockchain interactions
Create intuitive UX for complex financial operations
Ensure mobile-first design for UAE market

deliverables.deliverable: Figma design system with brand guidelines
Loading states and error handling patterns

design_principles.principle: Middle East aesthetic (RTL support, cultural sensitivity)
Clarity in financial data (clear numbers, progress bars)

task.name: Investor Portal
task.description: Complete web application for investors to browse opportunities, invest, and manage portfolio.

deliverables.deliverable: Vault detail pages with merchant information

features.feature: Filter by risk tier, industry, return rate, funding progress
Sort by newest, most funded, highest return
Total invested, current value, total returns

investment_flow.step: System checks: KYC status, investment limits, wallet balance
Show investment summary and terms acceptance
Wait for confirmation (show block explorer link)
Success screen with debt tokens received

task.name: Merchant Portal
task.description: Dashboard for merchants to create campaigns, track funding, and manage repayments.

wizard_steps.step: Funding Request (amount, use of funds, duration)

deliverables.deliverable: Unit tests for components (Jest, React Testing Library)

milestones.milestone: Design system approved and components built
End-to-end user flows tested and working

ux_principles.principle: Graceful error handling with recovery options
Loading states for all async operations

objectives.objective: Integrate all components into cohesive system
Conduct comprehensive end-to-end testing
Perform security audit and penetration testing
Load testing and performance optimization

deliverables.deliverable: Integrate smart contracts with backend services
Set up event listeners for blockchain events
Complete user journey tests (merchant and investor)
Smart contract integration tests on testnet

scenario.name: Happy Path - Merchant
scenario.steps: 1. Register and complete KYC 2. Create campaign (100K AED, 12 months, 15% return) 3. Campaign approved by admin 4. Vault deployed on-chain 5. Investors fund the vault 6. Submit milestone 1 proof 7. Receive tranche 1 (40K AED) 8. Submit milestone 2 proof 9. Receive tranche 2 (30K AED) 10. Submit milestone 3 proof 11. Receive tranche 3 (30K AED) 12. Make monthly repayments (115K total over 12 months) 13. Campaign marked as COMPLETED

scenario.name: Happy Path - Investor
scenario.steps: 1. Register and complete KYC 2. Browse marketplace 3. View vault details 4. Invest 5000 AED 5. Receive debt tokens 6. Track progress in portfolio 7. Receive proportional returns as merchant repays 8. Claim accumulated returns 9. View tax documents

scenario.name: Late Payment
scenario.steps: 1. Merchant misses payment due date 2. Grace period begins (1 day) 3. Automated reminders sent 4. Late fee applied after 3 days 5. Risk score updated 6. Next tranche paused 7. Collections process initiated at 7 days 8. Merchant makes payment with penalties 9. System updates and resumes normal operations

scenario.name: Default Scenario
scenario.steps: 1. Merchant fails to make payment for 14+ days 2. Vault status changes to DEFAULTED 3. Future tranches permanently blocked 4. Collateral liquidation initiated 5. Legal proceedings started 6. Recovered funds distributed to investors 7. Loss recorded, credit score destroyed

scenario.name: Partial Funding
scenario.steps: 1. Campaign fundraising deadline reached 2. Only 60K raised (target was 100K) 3. System checks minimum threshold (e.g., 70%) 4. Threshold not met 5. Refund process triggered 6. Funds returned to all investors 7. Campaign marked as FAILED

deliverables.deliverable: External smart contract audit (OpenZeppelin, CertiK, or Trail of Bits)

security_checks.check: Wallet security and private key management
Data encryption at rest and in transit

deliverables.deliverable: Load testing with k6 or JMeter

performance_targets.target: Smart contract gas costs: < $5 per transaction

deliverables.deliverable: Beta testing with select merchants and investors

milestones.milestone: All systems integrated and communicating correctly
Security audit passed with no critical issues

objectives.objective: Deploy complete system to testnet environment
Run beta program with real users (test tokens)
Monitor system behavior and collect metrics
Prepare for mainnet launch

deliverables.deliverable: Smart contracts deployed to Polygon Mumbai or Sepolia
Backend services deployed to staging environment

task.name: Beta Program Execution

deliverables.deliverable: Recruit 10-20 beta merchants and 50-100 beta investors

beta_goals.goal: At least 5 campaigns created and fully funded
Validate all milestone and tranche release flows
Test late payment and default scenarios (controlled)

task.team_required: Product Manager, Support Team, All Engineers on call

milestones.milestone: Beta program completed with success criteria met

success_criteria.criterion: Positive feedback from 80%+ of beta users

objectives.objective: Deploy to mainnet with real funds
Execute phased rollout to minimize risk
Monitor closely and respond to issues immediately
Gather feedback and plan iterative improvements

deliverables.deliverable: Smart contracts deployed to mainnet (Polygon or chosen L2)

deployment_checklist.check: Multi-sig wallet configured for contract ownership
Team on standby 24/7 for first week

task.name: Phased Rollout
task.description: Gradually open platform to more users to ensure stability.

limits.limit: Open registration with approval: 20 merchants, 200 investors
Standard limits apply (based on risk tiers)

task.team_required: Product Manager, Support Team, Engineers on call

deliverables.deliverable: Performance tuning based on real usage

milestones.milestone: Mainnet launch successful with zero critical incidents
First campaign fully funded on mainnet

launch_day_checklist.item: All systems green in monitoring dashboards
Announcement published on website and social media
Customer support team briefed and ready

objectives.objective: Implement advanced features based on user feedback
Scale platform to handle growing user base
Expand to additional use cases and markets

feature.name: Secondary Market
feature.description: Allow investors to trade debt tokens with each other before maturity

components.component: Order book or AMM for token trading

feature.name: Auto-Invest Feature
feature.description: Investors set criteria, system automatically invests in matching vaults

feature.name: Insurance Pool
feature.description: Investors can insure investments against default

feature.name: Merchant Credit Line
feature.description: Pre-approved revolving credit for high-tier merchants

feature.name: Multi-Currency Support
feature.description: Support for USD, EUR, and other currencies beyond AED

feature.name: Mobile Native Apps
feature.description: iOS and Android apps for better mobile experience

scaling_considerations.consideration: Database sharding for large transaction volumes

role.name: Frontend Developer
role.skills: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, wagmi, viem

role.name: UI/UX Designer
role.skills: Figma, User research, Prototyping, Visual design

role.name: DevOps Engineer
role.skills: AWS/GCP, Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, GitHub Actions

services.service: Blockchain RPC: Alchemy or Infura (paid tier)

risk.description: Smart contract vulnerability leading to fund loss
risk.mitigation: Multiple audits, bug bounty program, timelock on contract upgrades
Use multiple oracle sources, implement delays and thresholds
Conservative credit scoring, diversification requirements, insurance pool
Build investor base, implement secondary market, marketing
Ongoing legal monitoring, flexible architecture, compliance buffer

risk.description: Blockchain network congestion or high gas fees
risk.mitigation: Use L2 solution, implement gas relayer for users, batch transactions

metric_category.name: Platform Health
metric_category.metric: Funding success rate (% of campaigns reaching target)

total_duration.note: Some phases can run in parallel, actual timeline may be 8-10 months with adequate team size

parallel_phases.group: Phase 1 (Smart Contracts) can partially overlap with Phase 2 (Credit Scoring)
Phase 3 (Backend) and Phase 4 (Frontend) can run mostly in parallel
Phase 0 must complete before others begin

parallel_execution.optimized_timeline: With efficient parallel execution and full team

dependency.description: Backend needs contract ABIs and addresses
All core components must be complete
